evidence_summary: The sequence must capture the pivot from atmospheric despair to high-stakes kinetic action. Production must facilitate a transition from the static, heavy atmosphere of the Palace/Hangar to a high-speed aerial flight sequence that emphasizes the weightlessn...

In a moment of clarity amidst the thinning air, John Carter remembers the nine "thought waves" needed to operate the plant. He strips an air-scout machine of all weight and launches into a high-speed, desperate flight through the dying atmosphere.
Extreme wide shots of the scout machine against a vast, empty sky
